topics.title: Interaction with a Rockstar Supernova Musician
topics.summary: The studio features an interview with a keyboardist from Perry Farrell's band who discusses her career, upcoming appearances on Late Show with David Letterman, and personal anecdotes regarding the music industry.

topics.title: Preparation for Late Night Talk Show Appearances
topics.summary: The studio discusses the stress of pre-interviews, the dynamics of being a guest on talk shows, and the logistics of an upcoming contest to find the best local woman.

topics.title: Hottest Girl Contest and Limo Repairs
topics.summary: The studio discusses the results of a street contest for the "hottest regular chick," critiques various participants' pickup lines, and addresses ongoing mechanical issues with a limousine's air conditioning system.

topics.title: New York City Sewage and Water Systems
topics.summary: The studio explores the complexities of urban waste management, specifically debating how sewage is processed and separated from the drinking water supply in New York City.

topics.title: CabbieTV Website and Stand-Up Dispute
topics.summary: The studio explores a conflict regarding the unauthorized posting of stand-up comedy footage on Cabbie's website and discusses professional relationships within the radio industry.

topics.title: Street Contest for Hottest Woman
topics.summary: The studio hosts a contest to find the hottest woman in New York City, featuring participants who scouted women on the street and a guest contestant from one of those encounters.

topics.title: Beauty Contest Judging
topics.summary: The studio hosts a competition where three women are evaluated and judged by a panel to win a five-thousand-dollar prize.

topics.title: World Extreme Cage Fighting Contest
topics.summary: The studio hosts a competition to determine the 'hottest regular chick,' featuring a prize of $5,000 provided by World Extreme Cage Fighting and an appearance by fighter Uriah Faber.

topics.title: Eli Roth and the Success of Hostel
topics.summary: The studio features Eli Roth discussing his career trajectory, the financial success of his horror films Cabin Fever and Hostel, and his experiences filming in Prague.

topics.title: Hostel II Promotion and Horror Cinema
topics.summary: The studio discusses the upcoming release of Eli Roth's film Hostel II, the inspiration behind extreme gore in horror cinema, and various experiences on film sets.

topics.title: Colonic Treatments and Comedy Sketches
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding a guest's upcoming colonic treatment, the production of various comedy sketches involving characters like Bigfoot and Beetlejuice, and an update on a new website launch.

topics.title: Show News and Musical Segments
topics.summary: The studio discusses upcoming guest appearances, internal news regarding the "hottest regular chick" contest, a phone call from a musician with the Bleeding Deacons, and a transition into a music segment featuring Blackfoot.

topics.title: Republican Presidential Debate Analysis
topics.summary: The studio discusses various topics including Republican presidential candidates' stances on evolution, Iraq, and the economy, as well as news regarding puppy importation regulations and Princess Diana's memorial.

topics.title: Royal Family Privacy and Current Events
topics.summary: The studio discusses the lack of privacy for the royal family, recent news regarding a tuberculosis case on a plane, a medical transport crash, a mob hit in Brooklyn, celebrity breakups, and various headlines including Jack Kevorkian's press conference.

topics.title: Legal Cases and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of topics including the sentencing of a school principal, a lawsuit over missing dry cleaning, celebrity news involving Angelina Jolie and Paris Hilton, and upcoming comedy tour dates.
